chains.mechanism: Strong earnings and capex optimism concentrated capital in AI-linked tech, while inflation and higher-rate fears made investors favor the clearest growth leaders over broader duration-sensitive areas.
Geopolitical tensions pushed crude higher, so capital rotated into energy as an inflation hedge and away from sectors more exposed to weaker demand and cost pressure.
A mixed but slightly risk-on tape rewarded index-heavy AI/semiconductor names, pulling money out of sectors that were choppy or underperforming on a relative basis.
